title: SchemaVersionExtensions
description: Additional fields and field guarantees for the schema extension.

ancestor.description: The versionId of this Version's ancestor, or this Version's versionId if it has no ancestor, as an integer. Must match ancestor on the referenced Version entity.

versionId.description: VersionId as an integer. Must match versionId on the referenced Version entity.

contentType.description: Content type of the schema Version.

schemaDocument.description: The raw schema document for this Version as bytes.

schemaDocumentHash.description: The hash of the schema document for this Version.
